title: Ruining each other's careers: Supreme Court again urges Rohini Sindhuri IAS, Roopa Moudgil IPS to resolve spat
description: The Supreme Court on Friday again urged Indian Police Service (IPS) officer D Roopa Moudgil and Indian Administrative Service (IAS) officer Rohini Sindhuri to resolve their long-running dispute through mediation [Rohini Sindhuri v. Roopa Divakar Moudgil].A Bench comprising Justice Satish Chandra Sharma and Justice Sanjeev Sachdeva was hearing a petition filed by Sindhuri challenging the Karnataka High Court's decision to uphold a trial court order taking cognisance of a defam
